name: Floating Dock
summary: A macOS-style floating dock navigation component featuring icons that scale and magnify on hover with smooth spring animations, providing an elegant, interactive navigation experience for desktop and mobile.
detailedDescription: The Floating Dock component recreates the iconic macOS dock navigation pattern where icons magnify smoothly as your cursor approaches them. This component provides both desktop and mobile versions - the desktop version features a curved magnification effect where icons scale based on cursor proximity, while the mobile version collapses into a hamburger menu that expands into a vertical stack. The desktop dock uses motion values to track mouse position and applies spring-based scaling to create the signature magnification curve. Icons closer to the cursor grow larger while those further away remain at base size. The effect uses Framer Motion for smooth, physics-based animations that feel natural and responsive. Perfect for app launchers, portfolio navigation, product showcases, or any context where an elegant, interactive dock-style navigation enhances the user experience. The component supports custom icons, titles, and links for each dock item.
purpose: Create macOS-style magnifying dock navigation with smooth animations
Provide elegant, interactive navigation for desktop and mobile contexts
Support app launcher, portfolio, or product showcase navigation patterns
Deliver physics-based magnification that feels natural and responsive
Offer responsive design with separate desktop and mobile implementations
behavior: Tracks mouse position to calculate icon magnification
Applies spring-based scaling creating smooth magnification curve
Shows larger icons near cursor, smaller icons further away
Provides separate mobile version with hamburger menu expansion
Uses Framer Motion for physics-based smooth animations
Supports custom icons, titles, and links for each item
Maintains performance with efficient motion value tracking
visualCharacteristics: macOS-style curved magnification effect on hover
Responsive design with mobile hamburger alternative
Clean, minimal aesthetic suitable for modern interfaces
Interactive navigation feeling polished and premium
recommendations: Good fit for dashboards, admin panels, and data-dense application layouts.
Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
Combine with hero and feature sections to establish clear top-level page flow.
